name: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells apparel in Taiwan, China, Vietnam, and Japan. The company operates through Apparel department, Down Material Department, and Home Textile Department segments. It offers down and bedding; wholesale of outdoor supplies, household wares, clothing, and related packaging materials; food; and import and export of goods and technology. The company provides down products, including natural down, water repellent down, antibacterial deodorant down, color down, and flame retardant, as well as Thermobrid plus products for use in outdoor and home textile. In addition, it provides clothing products, such as snowboard wear, skiing wear, mountain climbing jackets, seamless wind and rain-proof jackets, biking wear, sportswear, jeans, casual jackets and pants, etc. Further, it manufactures winter quilts, cushions, seating pads, sofas, pillows, sleeping bags, gloves, and home decoration products. It also offers bedding products under the Kong lung brand. Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
